title: H-A2 normal/control bounded exact replay preregistration
purpose: Pre-register a bounded exact-replay diagnostic for the single normal/control candidate date found by H-A2.48 before computing candidate-trade PnL or making any stronger evidence claim.
source_import_summary: H-A2.48 parsed the already-downloaded low/normal-VIX control pack locally and found exactly one candidate-ready date, 2025-02-11, with candidate direction call. It did not run exact replay, compute PnL, approve paper trading, or claim E2.

exact_replay_design.strategy_family: Sub-System A ORB directional debit vertical spread
exact_replay_design.scope: diagnostic replay for candidate date only
exact_replay_design.entry_fill_model: Use bid/ask at 09:35 ET and compute mid PnL control plus implementable PnL with explicit spread treatment; do not assume market entry.
exact_replay_design.exit_fill_model: Use 15:45 ET bid/ask for forced close. Report mid PnL and implementable PnL separately.

strike_selection_rule.selection_basis: Use only 09:35 ET same-expiry SPY 0DTE call quotes on the candidate date.
strike_selection_rule.long_leg_rule: Select the nearest askable 0DTE call strike at or just beyond the locked ORB direction's entry-side moneyness target inherited from the existing Sub-System A baseline code.
strike_selection_rule.short_leg_rule: Select the higher call strike that matches the existing baseline spread-width rule when available; if not available, mark the replay blocked rather than choosing a new width from results.

reporting_requirements: blocker if any required quote or strike is missing
statement that this remains E1 single-candidate diagnostic evidence

allowed_inputs.use: control candidate date, direction, timestamp availability, and forbidden claims
read only for 2025-02-11 exact replay after this preregistration passes
confirm candidate-date quote availability without provider calls
confirm 09:35 and 15:45 underlying context for candidate date

forbidden_inputs.reason: Exact replay must use only the already-downloaded normal/control pack.
This preregistration covers only 2025-02-11 because H-A2.48 found no other candidate-ready dates.
The replay must not become an OOS tuning or filter-selection pass.
IBKR is not needed for the 2025-02-11 normal/control replay.
H-L1 remains blocked until real timestamp-clean news cases exist.
News capture remains blocked by its own cooldown/upstream response gate.

allowed_claims: H-A2 has a pre-registered bounded exact-replay plan for the single normal/control candidate date 2025-02-11.
The future run may compute candidate-date mid_pnl and implementable_pnl only after this preregistration passes.
The future run must keep the locked 09:35 signal and threshold 0.001 unchanged.
The future run remains E1 diagnostic evidence unless a separate validation artifact proves a higher evidence tier.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated from this preregistration.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
Do not add a new OOS-selected filter.
Do not broaden the replay beyond 2025-02-11.
completion_criteria: The preregistration names only candidate date 2025-02-11 and direction call.
The preregistration references H-A2.48 as the only source of candidate selection.
The preregistration locks 09:35 entry, 15:45 forced close, threshold 0.001, no new filter, and no OOS tuning.
The preregistration requires mid_pnl and implementable_pnl to be reported separately with $0.64 per-leg fees.
The preregistration uses nearest discrete strike rounding and forbids interpolation or post-result strike selection.
The preregistration allows future exact replay only after validation and forbids E2, paper trading, operational validation, and real-money claims.
tier_blockers: No exact replay has run yet
Only one candidate date is in scope
